title: bidens polylepis f. retrorsa
intro: Bidens polylepis f. retrorsa is a subspecies of Bidens polylepis, a flowering plant species commonly known as the 'Bidens' or 'Beggarticks'. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Bidens polylepis f. retrorsa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Bidens polylepis f. retrorsa is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be used in topical applications for skin issues and wounds.
